category_sources: Official klog README says klog is a plain-text file format and command-line tool for time tracking.

display_name_sources: Official repository README heading is klog.
docs_sources: Official klog README links klog.jotaen.net as Documentation.
Official repository includes Specification.md for the file format.

tags_sources: Official docs describe evaluating files, reports, tags, and .klg records.
